What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A young girl with long dark hair wears a black velvet top with a red heart detail while holding a silver flute horizontally and pressing the keys to blow into the mouthpiece. Behind her stands a green artificial Christmas tree decorated with white angel ornaments, while a white music stand with a blue frame is positioned in front of her near a green leafy houseplant.

Describe the specific actions the girl takes with the flute from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0 seconds, the girl raises the silver flute to her mouth; at 4 seconds, she blows into the embouchure hole of the flute; at 14 seconds, she presses the keys of the flute with her fingers; at 18 seconds, her fingers press down on the keys while standing before the white music stand.
